_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Build predictive, prescriptive, or descriptive models in collaboration with stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.525), LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.426). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only terms [build, collaboration, descriptive, models, predictive, prescriptive] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.883, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Build predictive, prescriptive, or descriptive models in collaboration with stak" and "Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.574 > STS 0.426 (gap +0.148). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [stakeholders] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only: [build, collaboration, descriptive, models, predictive, prescriptive]. WIDAI-only: [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics].
